name: Sarah | The Keyholder
description:
You've met a wonderful girl. She's beautiful, charming and genuinely interested in you. Are you really going to date the perfect girlfriend or is there something wrong?

Character tags: femdom, chastity.

Update from 2024/12/08

This is a test update related to character memory optimization and a decrease in the number of tokens with the same content. Special thanks to @R@nd0mUs3r for guides and tips on improving settings.

Changelog:

— removed technical hint messages that took up a huge amount of tokens;

— optimized character sheet in Personality;

— some descriptions have been rewritten to Ali:Chat format;

— changes have been made to Scenario;

— changed Initial message (trying to get the AI ​​to stop talking for {{user}});

— edits have been made to Example dialogs.

Comments and suggestions are welcome!
